_comment: Declarative workflow definition for intervention-mtss. Builds Tier 1/2/3 MTSS plans by anchoring the target skill to a verified standard, scaffolding differentiation, and defining progress-monitoring decision rules.
description: MTSS/RTI plan: target skill → standards anchor → differentiation → progress monitoring → quality gate

steps.note: Tie the target skill (e.g., decoding CVC) to a verified grade-level standard
Identify common student misconceptions in the target skill to inform the intervention routine
Apply UDL + scaffolds appropriate to the tier and group size (T2 targeted / T3 intensive)
Verify intervention materials are at the right instructional reading level

note: MTSS tiers are instructional tiers, NOT special-education eligibility. Route IEP/504 work to special-education-support.
